title: Section — Trades / Bid Packages
description: The work broken into trades and bid packages — the unit of buyout and subcontracting. Each trade groups one or more CSI divisions/sections and the scope items under it, so a buyout/procurement tool knows what to solicit and a sub-bid log knows what bucket each bid falls in.

csi_divisions.description: MasterFormat divisions/sections rolled into this package.

scope_item_ids.description: Scope rows assigned to this trade.

self_perform.description: True if intended to be self-performed rather than subcontracted, when stated.

bid_package_status.description: Buyout status as found in the documents; defaults unknown.

min_bidders_required.description: Owner-required number of bidders for this package, when stated.
